gems.title: 真爱留声
gems.summary: 年轻女子给已故姐姐发送的搞笑自白语音留言无意中被转给了陌生人，而这个陌生人竟隔着遥远的距离爱上了她。
gems.summaryEn: A young woman's hilariously confessional voicemails to her late sister are unknowingly redirected to a stranger, who begins to fall in love from afar.
gems.whyWatch: 一封错寄的语音情书，跨越生死与距离的温柔奇遇。
gems.whyWatchEn: A wrong-number voicemail becomes a tender, funny, and unlikely love story that bridges grief and distance.
gems.audience: 喜欢温情浪漫、笑中带泪故事的观众，以及《电子情书》风格的影迷。
gems.audienceEn: Fans of warm, bittersweet rom-coms and anyone who loved 'You've Got Mail' with a modern twist.
